attestation_note: Three errors corrected: (1) Scikit-learn removed from skills — it was inferred from experience bullets, not listed on resume; (2) Vue.js, GraphQL, D3.js, Chart.js added to skills — these appeared in project/experience bullets but were omitted from extraction; (3) Back-End Software Engineer Intern title at Master of Class verified as correct per original resume despite full-stack work in bullets.

experience.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Architected and deployed a cloud-based robot imitation learning annotation platform on AWS (ECS Fargate, S3, DynamoDB) using Streamlit, integrating Cognito for OAuth and RBAC to serve 5-6 concurrent annotators, fully provisioned via CDK
Implemented distributed locking using DynamoDB conditional writes with TTL-based expiration to prevent concurrent editing conflicts, ensuring zero data loss across 5-6 concurrent sessions

Decoupled dataset preprocessing by designing a FastAPI worker microservice; implemented VPC-internal service discovery via AWS Cloud Map, accelerating LeRobot imitation learning dataset generation by 63%
Deployed vision-language-action (VLA) robot policy training on AWS Batch with PyTorch FSDP across 4-GPU clusters and JAX LoRA fine-tuning
Optimized Docker multi-stage builds reducing container image size by 32% (19GB to 12.9GB)
Resolved production blocker by migrating infrastructure to Fargate + ALB, reducing cloud costs by 74%

experience.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Developed a productivity app achieving 4.8/5 rating on Chrome Web Store using JavaScript/HTML/CSS with Chrome Extensions API
Built RESTful API with Python/Flask and PostgreSQL, achieving 40% performance optimization through Webpack bundling
Designed and implemented feedback collection pipeline and monetization system using Stripe API, resulting in 15% user conversion
Prototyped React Native mobile app for cross-device synchronization

experience.title: Back-End Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Developed predictive models using Python (Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy) to analyze market trends, improving forecasting accuracy by 17%
Implemented automated anomaly detection system for financial data using unsupervised learning algorithms (Isolation Forest, DBSCAN), reducing error detection time by 23%
Optimized SQL query performance and integrated database monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana
Developed RESTful API using Node.js and PostgreSQL for financial analytics
Implemented interactive data visualization using D3.js and Chart.js

experience.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Developed a scalable account management platform using Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate)
Optimized SQL database queries (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle DB) through indexing, joins, and stored procedures

Enhanced UI responsiveness with Bootstrap and Material UI

projects.title: Web for Endangered Species – React-based SPA with Multi-Framework Integration
bullets: Developed a responsive Single Page Application showcasing endangered species using React, Vite, Vue.js, and Svelte
Implemented Vue.js version using Vue Router and Pinia state management
Used GraphQL API to fetch endangered species data for real-time updates

projects.title: Predictive Regression Model for Allegation Case Resolution in NYPD Using ML and NLP
bullets: Performed extensive data preprocessing on 5,000+ allegations using Pandas, NumPy, OneHotEncoder, PCA, StandardScaler
Trained and optimized multiple regression models including Linear Regression, Ridge, Lasso, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting
